name: Saimine - "Hawaiian
recipeIngredient: 1 Pkg. per person Top Ramen noodles (natural or regular)
Round steak or cube steak -- cut into strips
Salad oil with fresh garlic and ginger
recipeInstructions:
1. Fry the steak in the salad oil mixture until cooked through.
2. Cook Top Ramen noodles according to package instructions.
3. Scramble the eggs with soy sauce and sugar; crumble them.
4. Place the noodles in a bowl with broth.
5. Add the steak on top, followed by the scrambled eggs and chopped green onions.
6. Sprinkle soy sauce over the dish if desired for added seasoning.
